title: calamus oblongus subsp. mollis
intro: Calamus oblongus subsp. mollis, also known as sweet calamus or soft calamus, is a subspecies of the calamus plant, a type of rhizome that belongs to the family Zingiberaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and carminative effects, making it a popular natural remedy for digestive issues, nausea, and other health problems. The health benefits of calamus oblongus subsp. mollis include its ability to soothe the digestive system, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal teas, tinctures, and other preparations. Herbal preparations of calamus oblongus subsp. mollis include teas, tinctures, essential oils, and dried root infusions, which can be used to make a variety of medicinal products, including calamus oil and calamus extract.
